artifact.name: AdministrativeGender codes to OMOP
AllergyIntolerance allergy category codes to OMOP
AllergyIntolerance intolerance category codes to OMOP
AllergyIntolerance substance codes to OMOP

CareSite OMOP Table
Clinical Findings codes to OMOP
Condition Era OMOP Table
Condition Occurrence OMOP Table
Condition status codes to OMOP
Cost OMOP Table
Death OMOP Table
Device Exposure OMOP Table
Dose Era OMOP Table
Drug Era OMOP Table
Drug Exposure OMOP Table
Encounter Admission Source codes to OMOP
Encounter Class codes to OMOP
Encounter Discharge Disposition codes to OMOP
Episode Event OMOP Table
Episode OMOP Table
Extracts diastolic (LOINC 8462-4, concept 3012888) from R5 BP panel Observation to OMOP Measurement.
Extracts diastolic (LOINC 8462-4, concept 3012888) from BP panel Observation to OMOP Measurement. Uses suffix Measurement-Diastolic for distinct measurement_id vs BloodPressureSystolicMap.
Extracts systolic (LOINC 8480-6, concept 3004249) from R5 BP panel Observation to OMOP Measurement.
Extracts systolic (LOINC 8480-6, concept 3004249) from BP panel Observation to OMOP Measurement. Uses suffix Measurement-Systolic for distinct measurement_id vs BloodPressureDiastolicMap.
Fact Relationship OMOP Table
Immunization information source codes to OMOP
Immunization route codes to OMOP
Immunization vaccine codes to OMOP
Location OMOP Table
Maps FHIR MedicationStatement to OMOP Drug Exposure. Does not map MedicationRequest; see notes.
Maps measurement FHIR R5 Observations (categories: vital-signs, laboratory) to OMOP Measurement. Element paths are backward-compatible with R4.
Maps measurement FHIR Observations (categories: vital-signs, laboratory) to OMOP Measurement.
Maps non-measurement FHIR R5 Observations to OMOP Observation. Categories: social-history, imaging, survey, exam, therapy, activity, procedure. Element paths are backward-compatible with R4.
Maps non-measurement FHIR Observations to OMOP Observation. Categories: social-history, imaging, survey, exam, therapy, activity, and procedure.
Maps simple FHIR R5 Vital Signs Observations to OMOP Measurement. Element paths are backward-compatible with R4.
This mapping maps simple FHIR Vital Signs instances that are considered measurements to OMOP Measurement Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 MedicationStatement to OMOP Drug Exposure. R5 uses medication.concept (CodeableReference) instead of R4 medicationCodeableConcept.
Measurement OMOP Table
Note NLP OMOP Table
Note OMOP Table
Observation OMOP Table
Observation Period OMOP Table
Payer Plan Period OMOP Table
Person OMOP Table
Procedure Occurrence OMOP Table
Provider OMOP Table
Specimen OMOP Table
Maps FHIR R5 AllergyIntolerance to OMOP Observation. R5 change: type is now CodeableConcept (R4 was bare code).
This mapping maps FHIR AllergyIntolerance instances to OMOP Observation Table objects.
Maps blood pressure FHIR R5 Vital Signs Observations to OMOP Measurement. Element paths are backward-compatible with R4.
This mapping maps blood pressure FHIR Vital Signs instances that are considered measurements to OMOP Measurement Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 Condition to OMOP Condition Occurrence. Condition element paths are backward-compatible with R4.
This mapping maps FHIR Condition instances to OMOP Condition Occurence Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 Encounter to OMOP Visit Occurrence. R5 changes: class is CodeableConcept (R4 was Coding), period renamed to actualPeriod, hospitalization renamed to admission.
This mapping maps FHIR Encounter instances to OMOP Visit Occurence Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 Immunization to OMOP Drug Exposure. R5 replaced primarySource/reportOrigin with informationSource (CodeableReference).
This mapping maps FHIR Immunization instances to OMOP Drug Exposure Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 MedicationRequest to OMOP Drug Exposure. R5 uses medication.concept (CodeableReference) instead of R4 medicationCodeableConcept.
This mapping maps FHIR R4 MedicationRequest instances to OMOP Drug Exposure Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 Patient to OMOP Person. Patient structure is backward-compatible with R4.
This mapping maps FHIR Patient instances to OMOP Person Table objects.
Maps FHIR R5 Procedure to OMOP Procedure Occurrence. R5 renamed performed[x] to occurrence[x].
This mapping maps FHIR Procedure instances to OMOP Procedure Occurrence Table objects.
US Core Ethnicity codes to OMOP
US Core Race codes to OMOP
Visit Detail OMOP Table
Visit Occurrence OMOP Table
VitalSign codes to OMOP

page.name: Common Challenges When Transforming FHIR to OMOP
FHIR to OMOP Code Mapping Patterns
